zh.High Legh, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾希 萊
zh.Bradwall, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾布拉德瓦爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Legh於大約1240年出生在英國爾希 萊時，她的父親Richard de Legh21歲，母親Margery de Holgrave44歲。她於1260年之前與Richard de Lymm在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1300年在英國英格蘭爾布拉德瓦爾享年61歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Legh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Leigh
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Legh was born about 1240, in High Legh, Cheshire, England, her father, Richard de Legh, was 21 and her mother, Margery de Holgrave, was 44. She married Richard de Lymm before 1260, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1300, in Bradwall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Legh est née environ 1240, à High Legh, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Legh, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margery de Holgrave, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Lymm avant 1260, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1300, à Bradwall, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Legh um 1240 in High Legh, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Legh 21 und ihre Mutter Margery de Holgrave 44. Sie hat vor 1260 in England Richard de Lymm geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1300 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Bradwall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Richard de Lymm prima del 1260, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1300, nel Bradwall, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Leghが約1240年にイギリスチェシュアイアヒグ レグで生まれた時，父Richard de Leghは21歳，母Margery de Holgraveは44歳であった。1260年以前にイギリスでRichard de Lymmと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1300年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブラドワルで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Legh(이)가 대략 1240년 영국 체실르 히 레그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Legh(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery de Holgrave(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1260년 이전 영국에서 Richard de Lymm(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브라드월에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Richard de Lymm antes 1260, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1300, em Bradwall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Legh родилась около 1240 г. в местности хаи лег, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard de Legh было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margery de Holgrave, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Lymm перед 1260 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1300 г. в местности брадвалл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.
